rationale: Section 49.007 governs commissioner approval of school district boundary changes and consolidations. It does not regulate or limit homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district that is involved in an action under this chapter that results in boundary changes to the district or in the consolidation of tax bases is subject to consolidation, detachment, or annexation under Chapter 13 only if the commissioner certifies that the change under Chapter 13 will not result in a district with a local revenue level in excess of entitlement.
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase may indirectly affect local revenue levels, but §49.007 addresses boundary change certification, not exemption policy.
